    {
      "question": "In agile methodologies, what is the primary goal of continuous integration?",
      "options": ["A) To reduce the time spent on testing", "B) To reduce the time spent on debugging", "C) To reduce the time spent on change management", "D) To reduce the time spent on making changes"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "Continuous integration helps to reduce the time spent on making changes by detecting and resolving issues earlier in the developme
